name: Yeast Sandwich
steps: Add yeast and keep cooking. Whisk continuously.
Once dissolved, cook on medium heat to evaporate water.
The mixture will split separating the butter fat.
Strain off the excess fat. Repeat this process 5 times.
Remove from the heat and add a few drops of water to emulsify.
Season with salt and reserve in the fridge.
Warm the cream in a pan.
Add yeast puree and xanthan and blend.
Allow the mixture to cool and stir in the egg yolks and sugar.
Pass through a fine chinois and fill 11.5 rectangle moulds.
Once the biscuit is carefully demoulded, store in a container in the freezer.
Blend all the ingredients together and pass through a fine chinois.
Build a 1mm thick stencil on 15cm x 5cm silicon spread the rectangle.
Bake for 4 minutes at 180C with 60% humidity.
Remove from tray and allow to cool.
Discard the broken or deformed biscuits.

other_details.notes: Discard the broken or deformed biscuits.
